ChatRoom.title: Chat Room
ChatRoom.description: Represents the permanent private chat room

members.description: Map of active user IDs to their usernames (user1 or user2)

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: A single message in the chat room

sender.description: The sender username (user1, user2, or SYSTEM)

timestamp.description: Firestore server timestamp of when the message was sent

replyToMessageId.description: Optional message ID being replied to

reactions.description: Reactions map of emoji to list of user IDs

SecurityConfig.title: Security Configuration
SecurityConfig.description: Stores the SHA-256 hash of the passphrase for secure login

passphraseHash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the passphrase

PrivateRoom.title: Private Room
PrivateRoom.description: Represents a temporary private chat room

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the room was created

owner.description: The UID of the room creator

members.description: Map of user UIDs to their role (user1 or user2)

typing.description: Map of usernames to typing boolean state

pinnedMessageId.description: The ID of the pinned message

RandomQueueItem.title: Random Queue Item
RandomQueueItem.description: Represents a user waiting in the matchmaking queue

uid.description: The UID of the waiting user

createdAt.description: Firestore server timestamp of when the user joined the queue

matchedSessionId.description: The ID of the session the user has been matched with

RandomSession.title: Random Session
RandomSession.description: Represents an active temporary random chat session between two users

members.description: List of the two user UIDs

createdAt.description: Firestore server timestamp when the session was created

status.description: The current status of the session

typing.description: Map of user UIDs to typing boolean state

/chat/{roomCode}.description: Access point for permanent chat rooms

/privateRooms/{roomCode}.description: Access point for custom temporary private rooms

/privateRooms/{roomCode}/messages/{messa.description: Messages subcollection for temporary private rooms

/randomSessions/{sessionId}/messages/{me.description: Messages subcollection for temporary random sessions

/config/security.description: Security config for comparing passphrase hashes
